name: Macfos Limited- A niche E-commerce Company

posts.author: rk1771
posts.community: Macfos Limited- A niche E-commerce Company
posts.text: Macfos has come out with excellent results. Topline has gone to 102 crores with 9.85 crores net profit. Macfos Q4 2026_compressed (1).pdf (3.0 MB) It appears that margins have started expanding. In the last few quarters, may be due to spending upon warehouse, Robu 2 the margins compressed to almost 7%. In this quarter the net profit margins have expanded to almost 9.5%. Looks like some benefit of Robu 2 has started coming. We should wait for management commentary on 30th. Cash flow still being negative as inventory level has gone up to 79 crores from 55 crores. Generating a revenue of 308 cror…
